'''zhalaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachwork|coachwork]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachwork|coachwork]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhalaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhælæhæth|zhælæhæth]] || [[word:zhælæhæj|zhælæhæj]] || [[word:zhælæhæsh|zhælæhæsh]] || [[word:zhælæhæ|zhælæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhalalahath|zhalalahath]] || [[word:zhalalahaj|zhalalahaj]] || [[word:zhalalahash|zhalalahash]] || [[word:zhalalaha|zhalalaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhalahath|zhalahath]] || [[word:zhalahaj|zhalahaj]] || [[word:zhalahash|zhalahash]] || [[word:zhalaha|zhalaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhalafhath|zhalafhath]] || [[word:zhalafhaj|zhalafhaj]] || [[word:zhalafhash|zhalafhash]] || [[word:zhalafhaf|zhalafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhalahatha|zhalahatha]] || [[word:zhalahaja|zhalahaja]] || [[word:zhalahasha|zhalahasha]] || [[word:zhalahaka|zhalahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhalahath|zhalahath]] || [[word:zhalahaj|zhalahaj]] || [[word:zhalahash|zhalahash]] || [[word:zhalaha|zhalaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhalahathal|zhalahathal]] || [[word:zhalahajal|zhalahajal]] || [[word:zhalahashal|zhalahashal]] || [[word:zhalahakal|zhalahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhalahathatha|zhalahathatha]] || [[word:zhalahajaja|zhalahajaja]] || [[word:zhalahashasha|zhalahashasha]] || [[word:zhalahaka|zhalahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhalahathan|zhalahathan]] || [[word:zhalahajan|zhalahajan]] || [[word:zhalahashan|zhalahashan]] || [[word:zhalahakan|zhalahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhalahathaoro|zhalahathaoro]] || [[word:zhalahajaoro|zhalahajaoro]] || [[word:zhalahashaoro|zhalahashaoro]] || [[word:zhalahakaoro|zhalahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
